description_long: This storage box is a robust, industrial-style container with a weathered, metallic exterior. The box is reinforced with yellow and black hazard stripes along its edges, indicating caution and suggesting it is used for storing dangerous or sensitive materials. One side features a prominent flammable warning sign, while another displays a skull and crossbones hazard symbol, and a third side has a detailed label with various handling and recycling icons. The surface is visibly worn, with scratches and rust patches, giving it a utilitarian, heavy-duty appearance. The top and sides are flat and solid, with no visible handles or openings, and the box appears to be constructed primarily from metal panels. Its design suggests it is intended for secure storage in industrial, urban, or hazardous environments such as warehouses, garages, or restricted outdoor areas.
description: A rugged, metal storage box with hazard stripes, warning signs, and a weathered industrial finish. It is designed for secure storage of dangerous materials in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: This view shows a flat metal panel bordered by yellow and black hazard stripes, with a skull and crossbones warning sign on the left.
description_view_1: This side features a large label with handling and recycling icons, set against the same striped border and metal panel.
description_view_2: This view highlights a prominent flammable warning sign centered on the metal panel, surrounded by hazard stripes.
description_view_3: Similar to view 0, this side has a skull and crossbones warning sign on the right, with the same striped and metal panel design.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: hazard warning signs, printed label area
